ideation: This sequence mimics carefully holding a precious gem.  The animation starts with both arms extended slightly forward, palms up, as if presenting the gem. Then, one arm moves to cradle the gem while the other arm provides support. Finally, both arms return to a neutral position. The movements are slow and deliberate to emphasize the gem's value.

frames.beat: arms present the gem, palms open and up
arms move to cradle and support the gem
fingers gently close around the precious object
arms lower the gem carefully to rest
